text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Oh... I knew it wouldn't be easy to<n>find them...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
My curiosity gets the better of me<n>when I hear
Zenno Rob Roy let out a<n>small sigh, and I ask her
what's the<n>matter.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Well, I'm trying to find the owner of<n>this
bookmark.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Yes, I found it in a library book. I'm<n>thinking it
belongs to the person who<n>borrowed it before
me.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
It's such a lovely pressed flower<n>bookmark. I'm
sure this person is a<n>big book lover.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
I'd hate for them to be without their<n>bookmark,
which is why I want to<n>make sure I get it back to
them.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Plus, they're a fan of the cult classicRun, Umas, so they must be akindred spirit. Hehe.
choice_data_list:
Why not ask the student library assistant for
help?
What kind of story is it?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Oh, well... Um, I'm the student library<n>assistant,
so...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Wait... That's right! I can look at the<n>loans
system! I'm sure I can find their<n>name that way!
choice_data_list: Let's go check it out now!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Zenno Rob Roy uses her library<n>assistant
privileges to access the loan<n>data to find out who
the last<n>Umamusume to borrow the book was.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Now all that's left is to talk to<n>everyone who's
recently checked out<n>this book, and we can find
who this<n>bookmark belongs to.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
It'll be a lot of work to go around the<n>campus,
but...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
I'm excited to meet someone who's<n>read the
same book as me!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Oh, it'd be so fun if we could<n>discuss the
book and share our<n>thoughts on it together! ♪

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
It's a passionate coming-of-age story<n>that talks
about the trials and<n>tribulations of an
Umamusume who<n>runs mid-distance races.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
The protagonist is a gentle yet naive<n>
Umamusume named Umas. However,<n>she's not
good at speaking and gets<n>misunderstood a lot.
She's always<n>alone during practices.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
There's only one person she can call<n>a friend,
but unlike Umas, her friend is<n>super cheerful and
popular and has a<n>bright future ahead of her...
choice_data_list:
(Wow, she's really going into detail about this
book!)

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
But one day, tragedy befalls her best<n>friend. She
suffers a serious injury<n>from an unforeseen
accident and can<n>never race again...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
When her friend announces her<n>retirement, she
entrusts Umas with a<n>heavy promise... "You must
carry on<n>my dream for me."

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Sniff... Hic! That's one of themost famous scenes in the book, but Istill can't help crying when I thinkabout it!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
In the end, Umas ends up taking the<n>Fall Senior
Triple Crown in her best<n>friend's stead.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
What do you think? It's one of my<n>absolute
favorites.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
In that case, please give it a read! I'd<n>love to
discuss it with you after<n>you're done!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Zenno Rob Roy's eyes sparkle with<n>expectation
as she looks at me.
